data.current_summary: スクリプトタグの作成
data.summary_suggestion: Create a script tag for shop pages
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new script tag to inject JavaScript code into shop pages. This endpoint is deprecated; use the script tag endpoint instead. Requires the write_script_tags scope. Accepts a script tag object with src URL and display location. Returns the created script tag with assigned ID. Note: The API will attempt to fetch the script from the provided URL during creation; if retrieval fails, creation will not succeed.

data.current_summary: スクリプトタグの削除
data.summary_suggestion: Delete a script tag from shop pages
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a script tag by ID, removing the associated JavaScript injection from shop pages. This endpoint is deprecated; use the script tag endpoint instead. Requires the write_script_tags scope and a valid scriptTagId parameter. Returns a 200 status on successful deletion. Deleted script tags cannot be recovered. Associated inline scripts are automatically removed when the app is uninstalled.

data.current_summary: アプリストアアプリのアンインストール
data.current_description:
このAPIは OAuth のアクセストークンに紐付くアプリケーションをショップから削除します。
このAPIを利用した場合、ショップオーナーがアンインストールした場合と異なり、アンインストールフックは実行されません。
代わりにアンインストールフックで通知される情報は、このAPIのレスポンスに含まれています。

アンインストール時の注意点については、[アプリのアンインストール](https://app.shop-pro.jp/open_api#section/API/アプリのインストール)を参照して下さい。
data.description_suggestion: Deletes the application associated with the OAuth access token from the shop. Unlike shop owner-initiated uninstallation, this API does not trigger the uninstall hook. Instead, the information that would be sent via the uninstall hook is included in the API response. Returns uninstall information including account_id, application_charge_source_id, uninstalled_at timestamp, and reason. Note: This operation does not invoke the uninstall webhook, so the application must handle cleanup directly. See uninstall documentation for additional considerations.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks clarity about what is returned (response structure) and the specific side effects. Added explicit information about the response content (uninstall information parameters) and clarified that the webhook is not triggered, which is critical for AI agents to understand the operational differences and handle cleanup appropriately.

data.current_summary: 従量課金データの作成
data.current_description:
アプリ内で基本機能が利用された頻度に伴って毎月の請求が変動するようなアプリの場合は「従量課金」を使って利用者に変動分の請求を行うことができます。
※無料お試し期間中のショップに対しては従量課金データを作成できません。
data.description_suggestion: Creates usage charge data for variable monthly billing based on feature usage frequency. This operation allows billing amounts to fluctuate monthly according to how often the app's core features are used. Requires a valid recurring_application_charge_id as a path parameter. Cannot be used during free trial periods. Returns the created usage charge object with charge details and status. The usage charge will be included in the next billing cycle.
data.reasoning: The current description explains the purpose and constraint (no usage charges during trial) but lacks critical input details (recurring_application_charge_id requirement) and output details (what is returned). Added explicit parameter requirements and response information to help AI agents understand what inputs are needed and what to expect from the response.
